title: Reimagined Intro [MOVED TO NEW PROJECT]
description: [READ THE DESCRIPTION] Replaces Minecraft's intro with a new Mojang animation and the official Minecraft channel outro!
body: ![REIMAGINED INTRO IS NOW A MOD!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a120d8d22745d58be07756cc6f00dda60567c22.gif) # Future builds will be available here: |[](https://modrinth.com/mod/reimagined-intro)|[](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reimagined-intro)| |:-:|:-:| --- ## ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/310d5727e290e151b829c60dc91754ebff64a4f0.png) This modpack reimagines the iconic title screen with a stunning Mojang animation straight from Minecraft Dungeons. To make the experience even more immersive, it seamlessly incorporates the official Minecraft YouTube outro you already know and love—bringing a fresh, modern, and cinematic touch to your startup. Perfect for players who want a fresh and modern way to launch their adventure. ✨ ## ![Gallery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/833ebbaa71a01267166b2bc69e13a60a6106b36f.png) ![Mojang Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7847152e09bd059ba341fb4645db2a2d502e9184.webp) ![Cave Animation](https://i.imgur.com/6TLYTUj.png) ## ![Other versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dca0e0207946db431218af94bee779f0abaf6f03.png) All versions included in this list feature 60 FPS animation. No need to worry, more versions are on the way. |![Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f87f087027cac132ad08f1345d199123780a4f4.png)|![NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/img/content/branding/banner.png)| |:-:|:-:| |[1.21.8](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/Fabric_1.21.8/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.8.mrpack)|[1.21.8](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/NeoForge_1.21.8/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.8.mrpack)| |[1.21.7](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/Fabric_1.21.7/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.7.mrpack)|[1.21.7](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/NeoForge_1.21.7/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.7.mrpack)| |[1.21.6](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/Fabric_1.21.6/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.6.mrpack)|[1.21.6](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/NeoForge_1.21.6/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.6.mrpack)| |[1.21.5](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/Fabric_1.21.5/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.5.mrpack)|[1.21.5](https://github.com/noobtrieu-official/reimagined-intro/releases/download/NeoForge/Reimagined.Intro.1.21.5.mrpack)|
